title.$value: What You Need to Know About Profit Share

description.$value: Profit share is the income reflected to your account at the end of the term as a result of the profit/loss partnership in your participation account, where your savings are evaluated in Albaraka participation fund pool. Unlike interest, it is not committed in advance and finalized at the end of the term.

title.$value: About the Murabahah Method

description.$value: In the Murabahah method, the bank purchases the goods needed by the customer from the seller in cash and sells them to the customer on deferred terms by transparently stating its own profit margin. Both the actual purchase price of the goods and the profit obtained by the bank are known in advance.

title.$value: What Is the Participation Index?

description.$value: It is a performance indicator that includes the stocks of companies traded on Borsa Istanbul whose compliance with participation finance principles has been approved.

title.$value: Your Participation Account Is About to Be Opened

description.$value: We will evaluate your savings in Albaraka participation fund pool based on the profit/loss partnership principle. The profit or loss obtained at the end of the term will be shared according to the partnership ratio determined for you.

helper.$value: This is not a deposit account. No profit or yield is committed in advance.

primaryAction.$value: I Understand and Confirm, Open Account

title.$value: Information About Lease Certificate

description.$value: Lease certificate (also known as sukuk) is an investment certificate specific to participation banking that represents the ownership or beneficiary shares of an asset. It contains no interest and is necessarily backed by a tangible asset.

title.$value: Welcome to the Financing Application Process

description.$value: Choose the goods or services you need. Albaraka purchases the said goods or services from the seller in cash on your behalf and sells them to you on deferred terms according to the agreement made with you.

helper.$value: This transaction is not a conventional loan. It is a participation banking financing method based on the actual purchase and sale of goods or services (Murabahah).

title.$value: Approved by Albaraka Advisory Board

description.$value: This product offered has been carefully reviewed and approved by the Albaraka Advisory Board for compliance with participation banking and interest-free principles.

title.$value: Maturity Date of Your Participation Account Is Approaching

description.$value: Your participation account will reach maturity on {date}. On this date, the profit share amount earned from your account will be automatically reflected to your account.

title.$value: One Step Closer to Your Hajj/Umrah Dream

description.$value: The amount in your Hajj/Umrah Savings Participation Account has reached {amount} TL. You have reached {percentage}% of the target amount you have set.

title.$value: Own the Home of Your Dreams

description.$value: The participation banking-compliant way to own the home of your dreams. Albaraka purchases the home you have chosen on your behalf and sells it to you with suitable installment options.

title.$value: Investment transactions are unavailable at the moment.

description.$value: Your stock buy or sell orders can only be processed during the session hours determined by Borsa Istanbul (10:00 - 18:00). Our system cannot accept orders outside session hours.

title.$value: There Is No Interest System at Albaraka

description.$value: Albaraka is a participation bank that operates based on the interest-free principle.The profit and loss partnership model is adopted instead of interest. You can find the product you are looking for under the "Profit Share" heading.
